message:
refactor(core): replace runtime_compat::process::Command with tokio::process::Command

cass, caut, and wezterm modules now use tokio::process::Command directly
instead of the runtime_compat wrapper, continuing the asupersync
runtime compat contraction effort to reduce abstraction layer usage
in modules confirmed to be tokio-only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
